---
title: "Transoral robotic thyroidectomy using Versius platform: a preclinical feasibility study in cadavers"
date: 2025-07-25
author:
  - name: Agne, Guilherme Reimann
  - name: Liberato, David Eduardo Zuluaga
  - name: Ramos, Andressa Teruya
  - name: Feitosa, Valdenor Neves
  - name: Lira, Renan Bezerra
  - name: Kulcsar, Marco Aurélio Vamondes
  - name: Matos, Leandro Luongo
  - name: Bento, Gustavo Nunes
  - name: Bertelli, Antonio
  - name: De Cicco, Rafael
  - name: Debiasi, Gustavo Galvan
  - name: Artifon, Everson Luiz Almeida
  - name: Arora, Asit
  - name: Kowalski, Luiz Paulo
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Journal of Robotic Surgery"
  volume: 19
  issue: 1
  doi: "10.1007/s11701-025-02546-4"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Transoral robotic thyroidectomy using Versius platform: a preclinical feasibility study in cadavers</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
